subject: Got your message..
body:
Petra's text: "Hello angel, just arrived back to US from Prague. Have update for Jeffrey, if he likes, but on Monaday I will have more. Do U know if he is coming to Prague? Xxx Love P."

And I left a voicemail about 10am tomorrow
body_html:
